description: Expand a collapsed view branch in the agent context.

inputFields.name: selector
inputFields.description: Stable selector for the collapsed view node to expand.

description: Collapse a previously expanded view branch in the agent context.

inputFields.name: selector
inputFields.description: Stable selector for the view node to collapse.

description: Set the visibility of a view.

inputFields.name: selector
inputFields.description: Stable selector for the view whose visibility should change.

inputFields.name: visibility
inputFields.description: Whether the view should be visible.

description: Jump to a prior provenance state identified by the given provenance id.

inputFields.name: provenanceId
inputFields.description: Provenance id to jump to.

description: Jump to the initial provenance state before any actions were dispatched.
Build an `AttributeIdentifier` for a selection-derived aggregation so it can be used in a later intent action or inspected for diagnostics.

inputFields.name: candidateId
inputFields.description: Stable identifier for the selected candidate row. The identifiers are available in `selectionAggregation.fields` in the volatile context. They become available after a selection is made with a successful `paramChange` action.

inputFields.name: aggregation
inputFields.description: Aggregation op to apply to the candidate field.

description: Return a compact summary of one metadata attribute across visible samples or within each current visible group.

inputFields.name: attribute
inputFields.description: Attribute candidate to summarize. Use `SAMPLE_ATTRIBUTE` for sample metadata attributes from context. Use `SELECTION_AGGREGATION` for selection-derived candidates from `selectionAggregation.fields`.

inputFields.name: scope
inputFields.description: Summary scope. Use `visible_samples` for a pooled summary across the current visible samples. Use `visible_groups` for summaries within each current visible group after grouping has already been applied.

description: Resolve a free-text metadata value against current visible categorical sample metadata values.

inputFields.name: query
inputFields.description: Free-text metadata value to resolve against current visible categorical metadata values.

description: Search datum objects in one specific searchable view.

inputFields.name: selector
inputFields.description: Stable selector for the searchable view to inspect.

inputFields.name: query
inputFields.description: Search term to match against the view's configured search fields.

inputFields.name: field
inputFields.description: Search field name. Use an empty string to search all configured fields.

inputFields.name: mode
inputFields.description: Search mode. `exact` matches the whole field value. `prefix` matches the beginning of the field value.

description: Read documentation, fields, and examples for one intent action.

inputFields.name: actionType
inputFields.description: Intent action type whose docs should be read.

inputFields.name: includeSchema
inputFields.description: Whether to include the raw payload schema. The default response is more compact and usually sufficient.

description: Animate one named zoomable scale to an exact domain.

inputFields.name: scaleName
inputFields.description: Name of a zoomable scale from the current volatile context.

inputFields.name: domain
inputFields.description: Target domain for the scale. Use the same domain value shape that appears for this scale in `scaleDomains`.

description: Execute one or more provenance-changing actions.

inputFields.name: actions
inputFields.description: Ordered actions to execute. Cannot be empty or missing.

inputFields.name: note
inputFields.description: Optional short note about the intended change.

description: Show a category-count plot in the chat transcript.

inputFields.name: attribute
inputFields.description: Categorical attribute to count. Use this tool when the user asks for a bar plot, counts, or category distribution.

description: Show a quantitative distribution plot in the chat transcript.

inputFields.name: kind
inputFields.description: Distribution plot kind.

inputFields.name: attribute
inputFields.description: Quantitative value attribute to summarize. Current sample groups are used automatically when present.

description: Show a two-attribute relationship plot in the chat transcript.

inputFields.name: kind
inputFields.description: Relationship plot kind.

inputFields.name: attributes
inputFields.description: Two different quantitative attributes to compare. Keep both attributes in one ordered array: the first is rendered on x and the second on y. Do not treat either attribute as a grouping variable.
